transactions.desc: The Dodgers optioned Mills to Triple-A Oklahoma City following Tuesday's 9-3 win over the Athletics.
The Blue Jays recalled Clase from Triple-A Buffalo on Wednesday.
The Tigers recalled Brieske from Triple-A Toledo on Wednesday.
The Rangers recalled Smith from Triple-A Round Rock on Wednesday, Evan Grant of The Dallas Morning News reports.
The Red Sox recalled Gamboa from Triple-A Worcester on Wednesday.
The Orioles designated Keegan for assignment Wednesday.
The Red Sox activated Moran (elbow) from the 15-day injured list Wednesday.
The Orioles optioned Walker to Triple-A Norfolk on Wednesday.
The Orioles optioned Gibson to Triple-A Norfolk on Wednesday.
The Orioles recalled Weston from Triple-A Norfolk on Wednesday.
The Red Sox acquired Harris from the Athletics on Tuesday in exchange for right-hander Ben Hansen, Mark Feinsand of MLB.com reports.
The Red Sox designated Kahnle for assignment Wednesday.
The Athletics traded INF Brett Harris to the Boston Red Sox.
The Boston Red Sox traded RHP Ben Hansen to the  Athletics.
The Orioles activated Kremer (quadriceps) from the 60-day injured list Wednesday.
The White Sox optioned Schweitzer to Triple-A Charlotte on Wednesday.
The White Sox activated Schultz (knee) from the 15-day injured list Wednesday.
The Red Sox designated Kahnle for assignment following Tuesday's loss to the Nationals, Chris Cotillo of MassLive.com reports.
The Chicago White Sox traded RHP Ben Peoples to the Texas Rangers.
The Texas Rangers traded C Ben Hartl to the Chicago White Sox.
The Mariners optioned Simpson to Triple-A Tacoma on Tuesday, Adam Jude of The Seattle Times reports.
The Mariners recalled Wilcox from Triple-A Tacoma on Tuesday, Adam Jude of The Seattle Times reports.
The Rockies optioned Sullivan to Triple-A Albuquerque on Tuesday.
The Rockies reinstated Gordon (hip) from the injured list ahead of his start Tuesday against the Marlins.
The Dodgers designated Hernandez for assignment Tuesday.
The Dodgers recalled Mills from Triple-A Oklahoma City on Tuesday.
The Marlins recalled Brzykcy from Triple-A Jacksonville on Tuesday.
The Marlins optioned Pauley to Triple-A Jacksonville on Tuesday.
The Marlins activated Hicks (back) from the 10-day injured list ahead of Tuesday's game against the Rockies.
The Diamondbacks recalled Pfaadt from Triple-A Reno ahead of his start Tuesday against the Giants.
